channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Simba SC Wins CRDB Federation Cup After Beating Azam FC
item.description: Simba SC has secured the CRDB Federation Cup title by defeating Azam FC 1-0 in a tightly contested final at Gombani Stadium in Pemba. The victory marks another milestone for Simba, one of Tanzania's m...

item.title: David Bowie Exhibition Features Live Shows, Album Playbacks, and Commemorative Events in London
item.description: The immersive 'David Bowie: You’re Not Alone' experience at London’s Lightroom has expanded its run, with evening screenings now extended until January 2026. The exhibition, which showcases Bowie’s la...

item.title: Monsoon chaos: Mumbai and Rajasthan face severe flooding, injuries, and structural damage
item.description: Heavy to very heavy rainfall has been forecast for Mumbai and surrounding regions, with the India Meteorological Department (IMD) issuing red alerts for the city. The storm has caused widespread disru...

item.title: Toronto Maple Leafs finalize a two-year contract with defenceman Emil Andrae after off-season trade
item.description: The Toronto Maple Leafs have signed defenceman Emil Andrae to a two-year contract reportedly worth US$3.1 million, continuing the club's busy off-season roster overhaul under general manager John Chay...

item.title: Exploring India's Socio-Economic Diversity Through Family Stories
item.description: The article delves into the lives of seven individuals from the same family in India, each representing distinct socio-economic backgrounds. Through their personal journeys, the narrative highlights t...

item.title: Kericho Deputy Governor Criticizes Poor Office Conditions and Funding
item.description: Eng. Fred Kirui, Kericho's deputy governor, has publicly expressed frustration over the deteriorating state of his office, which he claims has not been renovated despite allocated funds. The deputy al...

item.title: Pitso Mosimane Eyes Bafana Bafana Coaching Role After Broos Exit
item.description: Pitso Mosimane has emerged as the leading candidate to succeed Hugo Broos as Bafana Bafana's head coach, following a presentation to the South African Football Association (Safa) technical committee. ...

item.title: Trump's 250th Anniversary Speech Highlights National Pride and Criticism of Opponents
item.description: US President Donald Trump delivered a speech on July 4, 2026, marking the 250th anniversary of American independence. The address, delayed due to weather disruptions, celebrated the nation's history w...

item.title: Neighbor's Gender Reveal Party Leaves Cat Blue, Owner Amused
item.description: A pet owner in Kenya was left both baffled and amused when her two-year-old tabby cat, Wilbur, returned home covered in vivid blue dye after a neighbor's gender reveal celebration. Sophie Jenkin initi...

item.title: DART Compensation Claim Dismissed, Petitioner Ordered to Cover Legal Costs
item.description: A petitioner challenging Tanzania's Dar es Salaam Rapid Transit (DART) system lost their court case, resulting in an order to pay legal costs. The ruling dismisses their compensation claim related to ...

item.title: Africa's Fashion Industry: A Driver for Economic Growth and Investment
item.description: The article explores how Africa's fashion and creative industries are pivotal to economic growth, investment, and job creation. It highlights the role of organizations like IFC in funding creative sec...

item.title: Iranian Funeral Ceremony Includes Call for Trump's Death
item.description: During the funeral for Iran’s late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, a performer publicly called for the death of U.S. President Donald Trump, marking the first direct demand for his assassinatio...

item.title: South Africa's Unresolved National Question: The #Mabahambe Movement and Structural Challenges
item.description: The article critiques the #Mabahambe anti-migrant protests as a symptom of deeper unresolved issues in South Africa. While the movement highlights frustrations over unemployment, crime, and poor publi...

item.title: China's Xizang Region Uses New Media for Intercultural Understanding
item.description: The article discusses how China's Xizang Autonomous Region leverages new media platforms like TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube to promote intercultural understanding and foster international cooperation...

item.title: Niue: A Remote Pacific Nation with Unique Autonomy
item.description: Niue, a remote island nation in the Pacific Ocean, is recognized as the smallest country in the region with a population of just 1,700 people. Despite its size, Niue maintains diplomatic relations wit...

item.title: Trump's Speech at America's 250th Birthday Celebration: A Blend of History and Political Remarks
item.description: US President Donald Trump delivered a speech on the Fourth of July, blending American history, patriotic rhetoric, and political commentary. The event, meant to mark America's 250th anniversary, faced...

item.title: Reckless Driving and Company Responsibility in Sherani Bus Crash
item.description: A tragic passenger coach crash in Sherani district claimed dozens of lives, prompting authorities to register an FIR against the deceased driver Babu Ustad and the Mekhtar Bus Company management. The ...

item.title: Couple Struggles with Husband's Porn Addiction and Relationship Tension
item.description: The article discusses a couple's marital issues stemming from the husband's excessive pornography use. Donna, a 33-year-old woman in a six-year relationship with her 5-year-younger partner, reports th...

item.title: Tragic Lynching of Woman by Mob After Police Handover
item.description: The article details the tragic incident in Maraban Jos, Kaduna State, where Malama Ummulkhair Muhammad was lynched by a mob after being handed over by police. The husband, Aliyu Muhammad, alleges that...

item.title: Google's AI-Powered Take on the Declaration of Independence in a 2026 Commercial
item.description: In 2026, Google released a commercial imagining a scenario where the Founding Fathers used modern technology to draft the Declaration of Independence. The ad, titled 'Group project, but make it 1776,'...
